content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Summit Tech Partners
Customer ID: C008
Contract ID: K006
Account Executive: James Okafor
Period: H2 2023 (July – December 2023)
Meeting Date: January 28, 2024
Attendees: James Okafor (AE), Alex Nguyen (CTO), Natalie Brooks (Head of Client Services)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Summit Tech added 7 new managed services clients in H2 2023, bringing their total to 26 clients — ahead of their target of 8. Annual revenue grew 31% year over year. Natalie Brooks joined the QBR to represent the client services team, which has grown to 8 staff members.

PLATFORM USAGE
25 of 25 licensed users active. Weekly report generation at 94 reports per week, up from 67 in H1. White-label dashboards deployed to 22 of 26 managed services clients. Automated scheduled delivery running for all active client dashboards.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- Natalie Brooks highlighted that InsightIQ's branded reporting has become a standard deliverable in their client onboarding package — "clients now expect it as part of what we do"
- SSO remains unresolved — Alex Nguyen reiterated it is a blocker for two enterprise clients. James Okafor provided updated roadmap information placing SSO in H1 2024
- Renewal and expansion discussion: 30 users at renewal in May 2024 to account for new managed services clients added
- Dedicated CSM: current ARR at renewal will be approximately $43,200 — still below the $60K threshold. Alex Nguyen expressed understanding but flagged it as a continued need

SATISFACTION RATING: 4.5/5
Natalie Brooks: "Our clients see InsightIQ as part of Summit Tech's service. Two clients renewed with us specifically mentioning the reporting quality. That's real business value."

ACTION ITEMS
- James Okafor to provide written SSO roadmap commitment ahead of May 2024 renewal
- Renewal proposal for 30 users to be prepared by April 2024
- Track ARR toward dedicated CSM threshold

NEXT QBR: July 2024
